HGSS.045.0000:
A bunch of DIGLETT popped out of the
ground! That was surprising!
HGSS.045.0001:
Brock: Small spaces surrounded by
rocks make you feel peaceful,\r
don’t you agree?\f
By the way, do you want to
exchange numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.045.0003:
Brock: I would love to have a Pokémon
battle against you!\r
Give me a call on Saturday nights!
HGSS.045.0004:
Brock: I see... How disappointing.
I would love to have a Pokémon battle\r
against you...
HGSS.045.0006:
Brock: Hey, you! Why don’t you
take a picture with me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.045.0007:
Brock: All righty!
Stand next to me and relax!\f
HGSS.045.0010:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
HGSS.045.0011:
Brock: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Have you seen a Pokémon called BONSLY?\f
They say you have to get it from
an Egg...\f
I am having a hard time finding one.
If you happen to have a BONSLY,\r
could you trade it for my RHYHORN? [0200,0000]
HGSS.045.0012:
Brock: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Have you seen a Pokémon called BONSLY?\f
They say you have to get it from an
Egg...\f
I am having a hard time finding one.
If you happen to have a BONSLY,\r
could you trade it for my RHYHORN? [0200,0000]
HGSS.045.0014:
Brock: I thought you might have one,
but I guess it’s not that easy...\f
If you find one, remember to trade
with me, OK?
HGSS.045.0015:
Brock: I am looking for BONSLY.
Are you saying you’ll trade\r
it for my RHYHORN? [0200,0000]
HGSS.045.0016:
Brock: Thank you!
I have been looking for BONSLY!\f
The RHYHORN I gave you knows the move
Thunder Fang! I trained it from an Egg.\f
I’m so proud of it, because it can
take down Water-type Pokémon, which\r
usually are a tough matchup.\f
Take good care of it for me!
HGSS.045.0017:
Brock: That RHYHORN I gave you knows
Thunder Fang! I trained it from an Egg.\f
I’m so proud of it, because it can
take down Water-type Pokémon, which\r
usually are a tough matchup.\f
Take good care of it for me!
HGSS.045.0018:
Brock: Hey, now!
That is not a BONSLY!
